author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Trump on if he would accept a deal that would allow Iran and Oman to control the Strait of Hormuz
When asked by ABC News’ Rachel Scott if he would accept a short term deal that would allow Iran and Oman, a key American ally in the Middle East, to control the Strait of Hormuz, President Trump said no. 
 
“It’s international waters. Nobody is going to control it … And Oman will behave just like everyone else or we’ll have to blow them up,” Trump said during a Cabinet meeting.
